basic_details.job_title: BECIL Media / Social Media Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Broadcast Engineering Consultants India (BECIL) Media / Social Media Consultant Notification 2026 has been released under VACANCY ADVERTISEMENT NO. 549 on the official website of BECIL. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BECIL Media / Social Media Consultant Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 27 years of age who have Graduation from a recognized university along with a minimum of 02 years consulting experience in projects with government organizations or ministries are eligible to apply for these Media / Social Media Consultant vacancies. The online application process for BEC

qualification.details: Graduation from a recognized university. Minimum 02 years consulting experience of working in different projects with government organization & Ministry etc.

selection_process: Shortlisting as per eligibility criteria Interview / assessment / skill test Final selection
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BECIL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BECIL Media / Social Media Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application online is 16th May 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Graduation degree from a recognized university. Additionally, a minimum of 2 years of consulting experience in projects with government organizations and ministries is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Media / Social Media Consultant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 27 years. There are no specific minimum age limits mentioned in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Media / Social Media Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 80,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Media / Social Media Consultant post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the Media / Social Media Consultant position as per the advertisement.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: For General and OBC category candidates, the application fee is Rs. 295/-.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST candidates. They are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on eligibility criteria, followed by an interview, assessment, or skill test, and finally, the final selection.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a government job?
faq.answer: Yes, this is a government job opportunity with Broadcast Engineering Consultants India (BECIL).

faq.question: Q10. What type of employment is offered?
faq.answer: The employment offered for this position is on a contract basis.
